assertions.description: Output is a clean Markdown table with a bold title, consistent number formatting within each column, and plain-language column headers
A source note in italics appears beneath the table
Rows are sorted intentionally (not alphabetically by default) to support the story

assertion_results.note: Clean Markdown table with bold title, consistent number formatting (commas, % symbols)
Source note in italics: 'Source: National Census Bureau, 2025 Housing Survey'
Sorted by median rent highest first as specified
Markdown table with title, consistent currency formatting
Sorted by meaningful column (budget change or department name)
Clean table with EU-specific terminology, consistent decimal formatting
Sorted by press freedom score highest first

methodology: Binary assertion testing: 3 inputs (standard, minimal, European context) x 3 assertions per skill. Each assertion graded pass/fail based on whether generated output satisfies the requirement.
